properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When the trial comes, He will comfort you When the whole world seems gone Peace come passes you

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Right now it seems gloomy From afar, the clouds's look dark it's hard to see the good, until they part

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Look closely it's Angels Wings Singing Hallelujah's unto the Lord Just take Him at His Word, And be certain of God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When the time will come, You will meet the Lord When the deep calls, the deep must response
